posts.title: We just bought back Seated
posts.excerpt: Co-founder David McKay announces that Seated is once again an independent, founder-led company after repurchasing it from Sofar Sounds four years post-acquisition.

posts.title: Say hello to Seated's new integrations marketplace
posts.excerpt: Features new integrations enabling easier fan data capture and synchronization with popular marketing tools for artists.

posts.title: Sofar Sounds acquires Seated to strengthen artist services
posts.excerpt: Announces Sofar Sounds acquisition of Seated, fulfilling the founders vision of giving artists more control of their ticketing experience.

posts.title: Our Year In Events 2020
posts.excerpt: Reflects on 2020 accomplishments, including 125+ live streams to 150,000+ ticket buyers.

posts.title: 9 things we learned from ticketing 90 live stream concerts (Part 2)
posts.excerpt: Continuation of insights from producing over 90 live stream concerts.

posts.title: 9 things we learned from ticketing 90 live stream concerts (Part 1)
posts.excerpt: Shares lessons from ticketing more than 90 high-quality live stream concerts.

posts.title: Seated announces live stream referral partnership with 200+ independent venues and promoters
posts.excerpt: Launches promoter affiliate network allowing venues to earn commissions on live stream ticket sales.
